data.title: CBL International (BANL) Stock Surges 25% After Hours: Here's What Is Happening
data.description: CBL International Limited (NASDAQ: BANL) saw a significant 24.98% increase in after-hours trading, reaching $0.64 on Tuesday. This growth comes after the marine fuel logistics provider reported an 8% increase in sales volume and a 22.8% decrease in net loss for the fiscal year 2025. For the year ending on Dec. 31, 2025, the company disclosed a consolidated revenue of $538.49 million, a 9.1% decline from the previous year's $592.52 million. This reduction primarily stems from lower global bunker fuel prices triggered by a decrease in Brent crude prices. The uptick in sales volume by 8.0% was attributed to new customer acquisitions, increased engagement with existing clients, and expansion into bulk carriers and oil and gas tankers. In 2025, the net loss decreased to $2.99 million, down from $3.90 million in 2024. Operating expenses stood at $6.91 million. Investors should note this significant data point pointing towards improved financial health for the company. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Absorption Chiller Market to Reach USD 2.98 Billion by 2036 as Waste Heat Utilization and District Cooling Drive Sustainable Cooling Adoption
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, on April 22, 2026, a report from Future Market Insights shows that the global absorption chiller market is experiencing consistent and significant growth. This growth is fueled by a rising interest in energy-efficient cooling options and the expansion of district cooling systems. The analysis indicates a positive trend in the market, with a growing number of consumers opting for sustainable cooling solutions.
Monarch Casino & Resort sees its price target increased to $113 by Jefferies from $103.

data.title: Dogecoin Says 'Do Only Good Everyday' While Promoting Dog Welfare — Analyst Says DOGE Ready For 'Big Move'
data.description: The official Dogecoin account shared an announcement from cryptocurrency payment company MoonPay regarding a significant donation for dogs. MoonPay, Dogecoin Foundation, and House of Doge collaborated to donate 1 million DOGE tokens valued at $96,720 to the AKC Humane Fund, a non-profit organization focusing on dog welfare. MoonPay initiated a fundraiser allowing Dogecoin donations to support the cause. The news was delivered in a humorous video with dog anchors reporting the updates. Dogecoin's official account praised the initiative, emphasizing the importance of doing good and supporting dogs with DOGE. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Woodward Partners with Lufthansa Technik as an Elite-Level Licensed Repair Service Facility for CFM LEAP Engine Controls
data.description: Woodward, Inc. (WWD), listed on NASDAQ, has recently signed an Elite Licensed Repair Service Facility Agreement (LRSF) with Lufthansa Technik. Under this agreement, Lufthansa Technik will now be an authorized service provider for Woodward, Inc. This partnership aims to enhance repair capabilities and services.

data.title: Ripple is experimenting with RLUSD in MAS sandbox for conditional trade settlements in Singapore, without full regulatory approval.
data.description: Ripple is currently testing RLUSD in Singapore's Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) regulatory sandbox. This testing aims to enable conditional trade settlements. It is essential to note that this initiative does not signify complete regulatory approval. The sandbox allows for experimentation in a controlled environment and facilitates the evaluation of innovations' potential impact within the financial sector. Ripple's testing of RLUSD in this setting demonstrates a step towards regulatory compliance in Singapore.
